# Electricity Usage Calculator
  
  

# Electricity Cost Calculator
Figure out how much your grow will cost in electricity!
Grow Light Wattage
Days in Vegetative Stage
42 days is 6 weeks which is a normal amount of time to be in the vegetative stage.
Vegetative Light Schedule
18/6
20/4
22/2
24/0
The ratio of hours of light to hours of darkness.
Days in Flowering Stage
70 days is 10 weeks which is a normal amount of time to be in the flowering stage. (12 hours of light per day)
Cost per kWh (Kilowatt Hour) in cents   
(Ex: for 18.5 cents per kwh, enter 18.5)
The average cost in the US is about 18 cents per kWh.
Wattage from Any Other Continuously Running Equipment
This includes any fans, pumps, or other equipment that runs 24/7.
Grand Total
Cost of electricity for ENTIRE GROW
* * *
Need to check how much a device is using? The “[Kill-A-Watt](https://www.amazon.com/P3-P4400-Electricity-Usage-Monitor/dp/B00009MDBU?crid=1V1S1DV5AMN5T&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.dg-9pR5W0gnYHa8u3Edf3QTz_ZtGzFhcgQSNn0aXaZz1F7sZ_KsmHCKvYRqFPt2p6G51C_Al8T62UUiMMALhRzshN5FmrcPeFjdICJ8PPPJk29CNzu1It1w2CNJa0DOkAljXMc55fmmkyqKiR955dV7K9AvpBGd6AkrW0Z5UTrSrbOG3GzCyfmxvmY_-zq--uVDeoNUWL0-DgyU0Lt0rXxwPk6uinuiASZSc0_AC-QinqupHfuy7plfh6I0VrNU91LtLCT1aiplOXii95JYwc-NL7pfwTZzdzEL0LT0KYvo.AnD-hdmZtYtyEtw_-3npBEunsqQ8CYysCZhCdl7rHJw&dib_tag=se&keywords=kill%2Ba%2Bwatt&qid=1764877958&sprefix=kill%2Ba%2Bwatt%2Caps%2C167&sr=8-9&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=02cd53ee4da630a5f837bb0ddbaa3844&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)” sits between the wall and any device with a plug and tells you how much electricity is being used.
[](https://www.amazon.com/P3-P4400-Electricity-Usage-Monitor/dp/B00009MDBU?crid=1V1S1DV5AMN5T&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.dg-9pR5W0gnYHa8u3Edf3QTz_ZtGzFhcgQSNn0aXaZz1F7sZ_KsmHCKvYRqFPt2p6G51C_Al8T62UUiMMALhRzshN5FmrcPeFjdICJ8PPPJk29CNzu1It1w2CNJa0DOkAljXMc55fmmkyqKiR955dV7K9AvpBGd6AkrW0Z5UTrSrbOG3GzCyfmxvmY_-zq--uVDeoNUWL0-DgyU0Lt0rXxwPk6uinuiASZSc0_AC-QinqupHfuy7plfh6I0VrNU91LtLCT1aiplOXii95JYwc-NL7pfwTZzdzEL0LT0KYvo.AnD-hdmZtYtyEtw_-3npBEunsqQ8CYysCZhCdl7rHJw&dib_tag=se&keywords=kill%2Ba%2Bwatt&qid=1764877958&sprefix=kill%2Ba%2Bwatt%2Caps%2C167&sr=8-9&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=02cd53ee4da630a5f837bb0ddbaa3844&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
You can grow ounces of high-quality bud with a high-performance, low-wattage LED like one of these. They both run on 100w, which will on average cost you less than $30 in electricity over the course of a grow.
[](https://www.amazon.com/Horticulture-Lighting-Group-High-Efficiency-Upgraded/dp/B07C59J8L2?crid=GHYH90WPOWXF&keywords=hlg+100&qid=1674252928&sprefix=hlg+100%2Caps%2C130&sr=8-3&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=761d3472d56117bf3f4c8ebf5b465aa9&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
[](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07TS82HWB?_encoding=UTF8&aaxitk=b4e8b763b21764fdf91654da5d0d3644&hsa_cr_id=1765825690501&pd_rd_plhdr=t&pd_rd_r=275a956e-b48f-41e0-be3e-76e0602261b6&pd_rd_w=51tAz&pd_rd_wg=PpO5w&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=09f3044e25aed01ec12c4341c3969f31&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)

Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
